name: binclusive-accessibility-skills
description: Binclusive accessibility mapping, audit, and remediation skills for web, React Native, iOS, and native Android projects.

interface.description: Map React/Next.js, React Native/Expo, ASP.NET/ASPX, iOS SwiftUI/UIKit, and native Android (Jetpack Compose / Android Views/XML) projects, audit accessibility issues, and fix selected audit tasks with controlled verification.
